# Ax = b 可解性及解的结构

```{python}
import sympy as sp
from IPython.display import display, Math

A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 2, 2, 2],
    [2, 4, 6, 8],
    [3, 6, 8, 10],
])
display(A)

col_basis = A.columnspace()
# 水平拼接：每一列对应一个基向量
col_basis_matrix = sp.Matrix.hstack(*col_basis)

print("列空间基矩阵（每一列是一个基向量）：")
print("col_basis: ")
display(col_basis)
print("col_basis_matrix: ")
display(col_basis_matrix)
print("*col_basis")
display(*col_basis)
print("列空间维数（秩）：", col_basis_matrix.rank())
```

[sympy 能解非齐次方程吗？](../appendices/8.md#sympy-能解非齐次方程吗)

[如果要方程组有解，b
需要符合什么条件？](../appendices/8.md#如果要方程组有解b-需要符合什么条件)

```{python}
import sympy as sp
from IPython.display import display, Latex, Markdown

b1, b2, b3 = sp.symbols("b1,b2,b3")

A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 2, 2, 2, b1],
    [2, 4, 6, 8, b2],
    [3, 6, 8, 10, b3],
])
U = A.echelon_form()
display(A)
print("echelon form: ")
display(U)
display(U[-1, -1])
display(Markdown(f"方程组有没有解由 $U_{{-1,-1}}={sp.latex(U[-1, -1])}$ 决定。"))
print("RREF: ")
display("A.rref(): ", A.rref())
display("*A.rref(): ", *A.rref())
```

## 可解性（Solvability Condition on b）

[我们看 AX 等于 B
有没有解，就是它的可解性吗？就是讨论它的可解性吗？](../appendices/8.md#我们看-ax-等于-b-有没有解就是它的可解性吗就是讨论它的可解性吗)

### $Ax=b \text{ solvable when } b \text{ is in } C(A)$

[$Ax=b \text{ solvable when } b \text{ is in } C(A)$](../appendices/8.md#axb-text-solvable-when-b-text-is-in-ca)

### If a combination of rows of A gives zero row then Same combination of b must give zero (number)

[If a combination of rows of A gives zero row then Same combination of b must give zero (number)](../appendices/8.md#if-a-combination-of-rows-of-a-gives-zero-row-then-same-combination-of-b-must-give-zero-number)

## To find complete solution to Ax=b

[To find complete solution to Ax=b](../appendices/8.md#to-find-complete-solution-to-axb)

### 1 $x_{particular}$

1. Set all free variables to zero
2. Solve Ax=b for pivot variables

```{python}
import sympy as sp
from IPython.display import display, Math, Markdown

# 构造增广矩阵 [A|b]
aug = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 2, 1],
    [0, 2, 3],
])

# 求行最简形，返回 (rref矩阵, 主元列下标)
rref_mat, pivot = aug.rref()
display(Markdown("增广矩阵行最简形："), rref_mat)
display(Markdown(f"最后一列就是方程的解：${sp.latex(rref_mat[:, -1])}$"))
display(Markdown("主元列："), pivot)
```

[怎么用 sympy 求增广矩阵的解？](../appendices/8.md#怎么用-sympy-求增广矩阵的解)

[rref 怎么看哪个是解？](../appendices/8.md#rref-怎么看哪个是解)

### 2 $x_{nullspace}$
